title: murraya microphylla
intro: Murraya microphylla, also known as the Orange Jessamine or Chinese Box, is a flowering plant native to southern China and Southeast Asia, recognized by its small white or pale yellow flowers and dark green glossy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Murraya microphylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to act as an antitumor agent. In herbal preparations, Murraya microphylla is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy in modern medicine.
